data.body: #685 PS5: Verified+1 (CI green, module-size fixed!) but LLM-Review-1 again: 2 findings — compute_validity plan-review branch reads deps (manifest_deps) + regver (manifest_regver) from UNSIGNED plaintext manifest for op-cert records. Same plaintext-trust class. ROOT FIX: bind the manifest into the op-cert SIGNED payload predicate so ALL manifest-derived checks (material/deps/regver) read from signed payload — exhausts the class. #686 ee0b is L+V+ green (waiting on #685). Dispatching manifest-authentication fix -> #685 PS6.
